description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

Create lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex with render(view_model) returning a self-contained HTML iolist/string. EEx templates (inline or under priv/templates/), all CSS embedded in <style>, minimal vanilla JS for tab switching and section collapse — no external CDN, no framework. Layout:

- Top: triage panel — finding count + severity breakdown + affected subject count. When zero findings, collapses to a single green confirmation row.
- Per-subject cards: prose statement headline; tabs for Spec / Code / Coverage / Decisions; inline finding badges where relevant
- Bottom: "Outside the spec system" misc panel with file diffs for unmapped files

Visual polish: clean typography, generous whitespace, color used purposefully for severity. Accessible (semantic HTML, sufficient contrast). Aim for "well-crafted and beautiful" — this is the user-facing surface and design quality matters.
title: Build HTML renderer with embedded CSS/JS
